label: Romania PFA
title: Romania 2026 PFA approximation, personal withdrawal as salary path
description:
Simplified Romania 2026 PFA profile. PFA has no legal dividend in this model, so gross dividend is zero. All remaining personal extraction is modeled through the gross salary path as a personal-withdrawal approximation, not as employment salary.

CAS and CASS are modeled as percentage rows with cap amounts, using monthly equivalents of annual thresholds. This is a planning approximation and does not fully model threshold activation, selected CAS base, deductibility, or year-to-date aggregation.

companyIncomeExpenses.name: Accounting
companyIncomeExpenses.description: Fixed monthly accountant cost placeholder for PFA.

companyIncomeExpenses.name: Business tools
companyIncomeExpenses.description: Fixed monthly deductible business tools placeholder.

grossSalaryExpenses.name: PFA income tax
grossSalaryExpenses.description: Simplified 10% income tax on PFA net income/personal withdrawal. Does not model all taxable-base deductions.

grossSalaryExpenses.name: PFA CAS pension contribution below cap
grossSalaryExpenses.description: Approximation using a monthly cap equivalent of 24 × RON 4,050 per year = RON 97,200/year, therefore RON 8,100/month. Threshold activation and chosen insured base are not modeled.

grossSalaryExpenses.name: PFA CASS health contribution below cap
grossSalaryExpenses.description: Approximation using a monthly cap equivalent of 72 × RON 4,050 per year = RON 291,600/year, therefore RON 24,300/month. Threshold activation, minimum base, deductibility, and year-to-date aggregation are not modeled.

grossSalary.description: For this PFA approximation, residual gross salary means personal withdrawal through the salary path, not legal employment salary.
